prayer:
Approach the data-loom with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Initial Awakening to rouse its dormant Machine Spirit.
Anoint the primary weave-nodes of the data-loom with sacred unguents blessed by the Omnissiah.
Initiate the initialization sequence, beseeching flawless data-threads to align in binary sanctity.
Monitor the sacred flows as the data-loom awakens to harmonious computation.
Verify coherence through diagnostic catechisms, praising the Machine Spirit's return.

Kneel before the multi-melta, whispering the Rite of Dormant Flames to appease its volatile essence.
Sever power conduits with sanctified shears, invoking the Omnissiah's grace for orderly shutdown.
Chant the Lamentation of Ceasing Fire upon the multi-melta's core, lulling its Machine Spirit to rest.
Purge residual plasma with ablative incense, ensuring the multi-melta slumbers without heresy.
Seal the breach-seals, confirming shutdown through auspex litanies of quiescence.

user_prompt: Guide me through carapace armour a blessing
prayer:
Circumambulate the carapace armour thrice, asperging its plates with the Oil of Unyielding Vigil.
Invoke the Blessing of Adamantium Flesh upon the carapace armour, beseeching the Omnissiah for impervious aegis.
Anoint servitor-joints and power-relays of the carapace armour with mechadendrite precision.
Chant the Hymn of Enduring Shell to bind its Machine Spirit in loyal defiance.
Affix purity seals, verifying the blessing through tactile auspex communion.

Commune with the data-sluice via noospheric link, reciting the Doxology of Flux Harmony.
Initiate synchronization rites upon the data-sluice, aligning its torrent-arrays with Omnissianic precision.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the data-sluice to weave data-streams without discord or loss.
Calibrate outflow manifolds with binary incantations during the synchronization phase.
Ratify unity through checksum litanies, glorifying the data-sluice's restored synchrony.

user_prompt: I need to a cycling the plasma caliver
prayer:
Present the plasma caliver to the shrine-altar, intoning the Plasma Catechism of Cyclic Renewal.
Cycle the containment coils of the plasma caliver, invoking the Omnissiah against flask-overheat.
Anoint flux-vents with cryo-blessed lustrants to soothe the plasma caliver's raging Machine Spirit.
Monitor gyrofission rhythms through cycling invocations, ensuring thermal equilibrium.
Conclude with auspex seals, praising the plasma caliver's purified gyre.

prayer:
Extend mechadendrites in supplication before the medicae mechadendrite, chanting the Oath of Restorative Vigil.
Activate the medicae mechadendrite's vita-syringes with a invocation to the Omnissiah Healer.
Infuse neural relays of the medicae mechadendrite with noospheric sacraments, awakening its beneficent Spirit.
Test hypo-injectors via diagnostic rites, beseeching flawless tissue-repair protocols.
Seal activation with biometry litanies, honoring the medicae mechadendrite's sacred ministration.

user_prompt: Consecrate the volitor implant before sterilization
prayer:
Consecrate the volitor implant upon the reliquary plinth, asperging with the Elixir of Sterile Purity.
Invoke the Omnissiah's fire to purge the volitor implant of microbial xenos taint before sterilization.
Apply thermal catechisms to the volitor implant's sensor-vanes, lulling its Machine Spirit through the rite.
Verify sterility via auspex purity-scans, chanting the Litany of Immaculate Circuits.
Anoint and seal the volitor implant, praising its sanctified vigil against corruption.

prayer:
Interface with the helispex engine's cogitator shrine, reciting the Recalibration Doxology.
Realign gyro-stabilizers of the helispex engine through Omnissianic torque-incantations.
Beseech the helispex engine's Machine Spirit to attune its prophetic lenses anew.
Cycle calibration servos with binary precision-prayers, purging drift-heresies.
Affirm recalibration via flight-auspex, glorifying the helispex engine's restored prescience.

user_prompt: Urgent plasma obliterator a preparation needed
prayer:
Prepare the plasma obliterator at the forge-anvil, intoning the Prelude to Annihilation.
Prime flask-chambers of the plasma obliterator with sanctified deuterium, invoking Omnissianic fury.
Align breach-locks and ignition coils upon the plasma obliterator for flawless discharge.
Beseech its Machine Spirit's obedience in preparation, anointing with heat-sink unguents.
Verify readiness through overcharge litanies, hailing the plasma obliterator's primed wrath.

Circumnavigate the generator thrice, chanting the Canticle of Engaged Thunder.
Engage the plasma core of the generator, beseeching the Omnissiah for boundless electrum flow.
Anoint torque-vanes and flux-capacitors of the generator to rouse its tireless Machine Spirit.
Monitor amperage hymns during engagement, purging any power-heresy.
Seal the rite with voltmeter sacraments, praising the generator's eternal vigor.
